name: Customer opens public quote, taps Decline, picks 'Price' chip + writes a note
description: Public quote actions panel exposes Decline alongside Accept and Ask a question. Decline opens an inline form with reason chips (Price / Timing / Going elsewhere / Other), an optional freetext note, and an optional name field. Submit POSTs /quotes/:id/decline; backend flips quote.status to 'lost', records lostAt + declineReason + declineNote, emits a quote.declined domain event that surfaces as a generic notification on the contractor's bell.

persona.name: Asha Patel
persona.role: Customer received a quote email from Diego
persona.context: Got three quotes for the same job; Diego's was the most expensive.

preconditions: Quote exists, status='sent', has a customerId pointing to Asha
Asha taps the email CTA, lands on /q/{id}

steps.expect: Hi Asha — here's your quote' greeting renders; line items + total visible; Accept (with type-name input) is primary; secondary buttons 'Ask a question' and 'Decline' below it
Decline form expands inline: 4 chip buttons (Price / Timing / Going elsewhere / Other), freetext textarea, optional name field, red 'Send decline' CTA, X button to close

steps.action: Taps Price chip → writes 'Came in higher than I budgeted.' → name 'Asha P.' → Send decline
steps.expect: POST /api/quotes/{id}/decline returns 200; success card 'Got it — thanks for letting them know / Your contractor has been notified.' replaces the form; the Accept block also disappears
Quote header now shows DECLINED pill (pink); actions panel hidden entirely (cannot retry decline or accept); contact-back footer still shows contractor phone
Generic notification on Diego's bell with title 'Asha Patel declined your quote · price' and body 'Came in higher than I budgeted.'

evaluationCriteria.check: Decline panel uses muted/red palette to distinguish from the green Accept; chip toggles have a clear active state (pink border + green text)
Customer never feels they need to write a paragraph to decline; the chips honour quick taps
Already-accepted quotes return 409 from /decline; the FE renders the pre-existing ACCEPTED pill and never shows the decline option
Chip buttons are real <button> elements with role=switch semantics; focus order is reason chips → note → name → Send decline
